use_cases: Displaying active filters as removable chips in an e-commerce product listing page
Showing applied search criteria with quick removal functionality
Providing a breadcrumb-style filter summary bar for filtering dashboards
Enabling users to clear all applied filters with a single click
Supporting responsive filter display across desktop and mobile interfaces
ai_summary: A minimalist filter breadcrumb component that displays active filters as removable chips with dark mode support. Part of a Next.js shop component library, it renders filter criteria (category, price, color) as pill-shaped tags with individual remove buttons and a clear-all option. Built with Tailwind CSS using responsive breakpoints and standard flat styling.
